location.office_time_required: Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays (Anchor Days); certain positions may require additional in-office workdays

seniority.level: Senior IC / Lead (Staff or Principal equivalent)
level_signals: 5+ years in management consulting, investment banking, or related fields
Comp range $230K–$260K base, consistent with senior individual contributor at a high-growth SaaS company

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of strategy experience, with 5+ years' relevant experience in management consulting, investment banking, or related professional services fields
Highly structured mindset with a strong focus on driving outcomes and turning data into actionable insights
Excellent financial modeling skills, with strong attention to detail and high standards for quality
Outstanding executive-level written and verbal communication skills
Ability to operate independently with senior stakeholders and manage relationships, deliverables, and timelines with minimal supervision
Genuine enthusiasm for and proficiency with AI tools; we use AI across the board to move faster and work smarter, and you do too
Hands-on experience with modern AI tools like Notion AI, Claude, Codex, or similar is expected; you should be actively experimenting with new models and workflows, not just aware they exist
Deep understanding of AI SaaS business models, monetization strategies, and pricing frameworks, or a strong demonstrated ability to get up to speed quickly
Data self-sufficiency; knowledge of SQL is required
Comfort working in a high-growth, constantly changing environment with passion and enthusiasm

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Prior experience in strategy and operations in B2B SaaS businesses
Proficiency in Python or R for data analysis and modeling

scope.surface: Business Operations team; primary partners are Engineering, Product, and Design teams
primary_metrics_inferred: Strategic and operational outcomes across all Notion products
core_responsibilities: Proactively surface and prioritize high-impact strategic and operational opportunities and own them end-to-end from scoping through execution
Work cross-functionally with product, engineering, and go-to-market leaders to define and implement strategy across all Notion products
Structure complex, ambiguous strategic problems for the Notion leadership team, defining clear hypotheses and building business cases and quantitative models
Work closely with cross-functional leaders to define and manage key drivers of business performance
Develop a comprehensive understanding of competitive positioning by using, assessing, and developing insights about peer businesses
Deeply understand Notion customers and the broader market landscape to uncover insights
Use AI tools and drive automation to create scalable solutions

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of compensation package; form not specified

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($230K–$260K base for SF)
Clear ownership model: end-to-end from scoping through execution
Explicit encouragement to apply even without perfect background alignment
High-visibility role partnering directly with senior leadership
AI tooling is central and actively used, not performative
red_flags: Hybrid requirement of three anchor days per week (Mon, Tue, Thu) in office — eliminates remote candidates
10+ years of experience requirement with 5+ years in consulting/banking is a high bar that may screen out strong operators from industry backgrounds
Visa sponsorship not addressed in the JD
#LI-Onsite tag conflicts with no explicit mention of fully on-site policy; treated as hybrid based on Anchor Days description

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years of experience requirement and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
compensation.equity_form (equity mentioned but vehicle not specified)
location.visa_sponsorship (not addressed in JD; marked unclear)
ambiguities: JD footer tag is #LI-Onsite but the body describes a hybrid Anchor Days policy (Mon/Tue/Thu in office). Treated as hybrid here.

The requirement 'Deep understanding of AI SaaS business models... or a strong demonstrated ability to get up to speed quickly' introduces optionality; classified as hard because it appears in the required skills section, but the 'ability to get up to speed' clause softens it.
manages_people is false based on current role scope, but 'Prior people management experience' is listed as a nice-to-have, suggesting this role may eventually manage people.
